name: Eagle Shark
desc: If your opponent controls 2 or more monsters, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. If you control "Panther Shark", you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only control 1 "Eagle Shark".
mnst_eff: If your opponent controls 2 or more monsters, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. If you control "Panther Shark", you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only control 1 "Eagle Shark".
eff: If your opponent controls 2 or more monsters, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. If you control "Panther Shark", you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only control 1 "Eagle Shark".

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
